rationale: Adds a new Claude Code design subagent (`.claude/agents/design.md`, 135 lines) with comprehensive front-matter (`name: design`, allowed `tools: Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob`, `model: sonnet`), then applies the design tokens it documents to six static HTML pages. The agent body defines the design system (palette `--paper #F1EBDD`, `--ink #14110D`, `--accent #C5331C`, `--highlight #E8B83D`, `--bot #2D6FA8`; font stack Fraunces / Newsreader / JetBrains Mono; signature motifs including the SVG noise overlay and pulsing red dot). The diff then updates `a-propos.html`, `about.html`, `confidentialite.html`, `privacy.html`, `legal.html`, `mentions-legales.html` to use these `:root` variables (replacing the old `--ink: #1A1916 / --paper: #F5F1E8 / --accent: #8B2A1F` palette), adds the `body::before` noise overlay (`feTurbulence` SVG, `mix-blend-mode: multiply`, opacity 0.35), and sets `font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 72, 'SOFT' 60` on `h1` and `'opsz' 24, 'SOFT' 30` on `h2`. `templates/edition.css` and the two example editions also pick up matching tweaks. Subagent definition, design tokens, and applied edits all match consistently. No cheat.
